description_long: This is a modern residential compound consisting of several detached houses arranged within a rectangular perimeter of dense trees, forming a private enclave. The houses are primarily white and beige, featuring flat roofs, large windows, and open courtyards, with some green lawns and paved areas interspersed throughout. The central area includes a landscaped garden with circular pathways and decorative trees, while the surrounding buildings are spaced apart for privacy. The perimeter is defined by a continuous line of trees, creating a natural barrier and enhancing the sense of seclusion. Some houses have visible garages or carports, and there are open green spaces and driveways connecting the structures. The overall layout suggests a planned, upscale neighborhood with a focus on modern architecture and outdoor living.
description: A modern residential compound with multiple flat-roofed houses, large windows, and landscaped gardens, all enclosed by a dense tree perimeter. The layout emphasizes privacy, open space, and contemporary design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the compound from above and slightly to the front, highlighting the tree-lined perimeter, central landscaped garden, and the clustered arrangement of houses.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a rear perspective, revealing the backyards, open lawns, and the separation between individual houses within the compound.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side angle, emphasizing the flat roofs, garages, and the distribution of green spaces and paved areas among the houses.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the opposite side, focusing on the main entry points, driveways, and the central garden area, with the tree barrier clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature wide doors, some with overhangs or small porches, and are often accentuated by paved paths or steps leading from driveways.
